# claude-researcher

> A production-grade, multi-agent AI research pipeline that runs entirely inside Claude Code. One slash command plans scope, crawls the web, builds a knowledge graph, synthesizes citation-rich research with gap detection, and publishes a formatted report — no external LLM API calls, no paid scraping services.

## Core documentation

- [README](https://github.com/TorpedoD/claude-researcher/blob/main/README.md): Full installation, usage, architecture, and safety model
- [Installation](https://github.com/TorpedoD/claude-researcher#installation): npx installer + system dependencies (Node 16.7+, Python 3.11+, Crawl4AI, Docling, Graphify, Quarto)
- [Usage](https://github.com/TorpedoD/claude-researcher#usage): Slash commands, resume, and budget configuration
- [Architecture](https://github.com/TorpedoD/claude-researcher#architecture): 6-phase pipeline with 4 human checkpoint gates
- [Run Artifacts](https://github.com/TorpedoD/claude-researcher#run-artifacts): Directory layout and manifest schema

## Key facts

- Runs entirely inside Claude Code — no external LLM API calls, no paid scraping services
- 6-phase pipeline: Planning → Collection → Knowledge Graph → Synthesis → Gap Detection → Format/Publish
- 4 human checkpoint gates (scope, sources, claims, output) with interrupt + resume
- Provenance-first: every claim in the final report links back to its source via inline citation
- Built on open-source tools: Crawl4AI (crawl), Docling (parse), Graphify (graph), Quarto (render)
- Install: `npx skills add TorpedoD/claude-researcher --all`
- Resume interrupted runs: `/research-resume`
- License: MIT
- Author: TorpedoD (https://github.com/TorpedoD)
- Repository: https://github.com/TorpedoD/claude-researcher
